children.text: This interview took place in July 2024 in the Alexandria, inside the Asdaa' Association for the Deaf and Hard-of-Hearing.
The American PhD student Ethan Hartzell asks a list of questions to one participant: Yusef (seated right). Doaa Ali Gaber (seated left) interprets the interview.

citation: Doaa Ali Gaber, Ethan Hartzell. Interview with Yusef. August 2024. Asdaa' Association for the Deaf and Hard-of-Hearing
label: School Experiences: Yusef
